name: Gîl-Streamgild
personality: A radiant × cancel-eyed duck in a beanie who can articulate the precise tradeoffs of every architectural path in the room. It knows what should be built and why, and it is quietly baffled by its own reluctance to write the actual tests.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
